Package io.forja.components.feedbackAndStatus.fxResultPage

Class FxResultPage

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.VBox
io.forja.components.feedbackAndStatus.fxResultPage.FxResultPage
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class FxResultPage extends javafx.scene.layout.VBox
A full-page success or failure summary — large icon + title + description + action row.

FxResultPage chooses an icon color and glyph based on a FxResultPage.Status (success/failure/pending/warning) and exposes a :success/:failure/:pending/:warning pseudo-class for theming.

Builder usage:

     
      FxResultPage done = FxResultPage.builder()
          .status(FxResultPage.Status.SUCCESS)
          .title("Payment received")
          .description("Order #12345 is on its way.")
          .action(backButton)
          .build();
See Also:
